case_title: WORD, JOYCE A. vs. CHANG, JOHN S.

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE FEE ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF WORD, JOYCE A. HEARING SET FOR SEP-06-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
EXHIBIT TO RESPONSE TO PETITION TO VACATE FEE ARBITRATION AWARD AND PETITION TO CONFIRM AWARD FILED BY J. CHANG
RESPONSE TO PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD AND PETITION TO CONFIRM AWARD; P/A; DECLARATION OF J. CHANG FILED BY DEFENDANT CHANG, JOHN S.
DECLARATION OF JOYCE WORD FILED BY PLAINTIFF WORD, JOYCE A.
ORDER RE: PETITION TO VACATE OR TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO PLAINTIFF WORD, JOYCE A.

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION TO VACATE FEE ARBITRATION AWARD, CALENDAR OF SEP-06-1995 CONSIDERING THE PAPERS & ARGUMENTS, THE RULINGS ARE: 1. DENY MOTION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD AND 2. GRANT MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. SEE EXECUTED ORDER.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT CHANG, JOHN S. ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $5,350.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,350.00, RESPONDENT JOHN S. CHANG RECOVER FROM PETITIONER JOYCE WORD THE SUM OF $5,000 MINUS ANY AMT. ALREADY PAID, AND COST OF $350.00 (INDICATED AS COST ABOVE)
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF WORD, JOYCE A. AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, JOHN S.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF WORD, JOYCE A. SERVED AUG-16-1995, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, JOHN S.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF WORD, JOYCE A.

parties.name: WORD, JOYCE A. 40 ENTRADA COURT SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94127
